body.title: 20 pre-existing failures in test_granny_rules_engine (match_rule returns None vs CC.0)
body.description:
Discovered 2026-07-03 during T-inference-mark-anthropic-defunct (unrelated targeted sprint). tests/test_granny_rules_engine.py has 20 failures — e.g. match_rule({'role':'builder','tags':[]}, []) returns None but the test asserts 'CC.0' (the no-rule fallback). Both TestMatchRule and TestRunOnce (bus-dispatch, gate-clearing, one-at-a-time, guru-routing) fail. Almost certainly fallout from the 2026-07-02 worker-dispatch restructure (D-worker-pool-*, D-worker-instance-identity, shim-frontdoor/leasing/granny-wake) — either match_rule's fallback/signature changed and the tests weren't updated (test drift) OR the dispatch fallback is genuinely broken. ON THE DS.0 DISPATCH PATH: Granny must dispatch to DS.0, so this matters for the DS.0 course. NOT caused by the inference change (isolated to inference/sources.py).

**Affected files:** unseen_university/devices/granny/ (match_rule + run_once), tests/test_granny_rules_engine.py.
**Design rules:** none apply (test/behavior reconciliation).
**Scope boundary:** IN — determine drift-vs-break, fix so the 20 tests pass (update tests if behavior intentionally changed, or fix match_rule if broken). OUT — the pull-dispatch redesign (D-granny-pull-dispatch-model).
**Test plan:** the 20 failing tests in tests/test_granny_rules_engine.py go green; if behavior changed intentionally, the tests are updated to the new contract with a comment naming the decision that changed it.
**Completion criteria:** `pytest tests/test_granny_rules_engine.py` is green; each changed assertion (if any) cites the decision that changed the contract.
**Rollback:** git revert.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: ROOT: the package-collapse refactor (a5f4dab0) wrote CC.1 into the dispatch config (_default_config + granny.yaml) for a builder never run on this 4-core/16GB box, so master/catch-all tickets routed to a non-running CC.1 -> no dispatch -> stall alarm -> Granny parked. Fixed: reverted CC.1->CC.0 (this session's worker), restored the high-inertia tags_any rule to _default_config (mirrors granny.yaml). Reconciled 20 stale tests: empty-rules->None, CC.0 self-announce + not-stalled run_once fixture, fake_bus worker_name kwarg, DB-error->ticket_store-error. 27/27 green (commit 085f4280). Sibling test_granny_bus_dispatch.py (10 same-root failures) filed as T-granny-bus-dispatch-tests-red.
body.unproven_reason: proof_emitter can't prove a REGRESSION fix: its red->green model looks for the red at the pre-implementation state, but here the correct behavior (master->CC.0) predates the CC.1 regression, so the pre-feature state is already green. The authentic red is an intermediate commit (a5f4dab0's CC.1 config), which proof_emitter can't target. Fix IS empirically proven (20 tests red->green; test_master_role_routes_to_cc went CC.1-red -> CC.0-green). Missing lever: a proof mode that reds against a named regressing commit, not the pre-feature state.
